title: Bitter Lemon Mediterranean Tomato Stir-fry
description: A light and festive mediterranean dish featuring a bitter lemon sauce that deglazes the pan to create a rich flavor profile without the use of dairy or gluten.

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp olive oil
ingredients.notes: For a lighter touch, consider using avocado or sesame seed oil instead.

ingredients.name: 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: Use the bitter part of the lemon for added depth and complexity in flavor.

ingredients.name: 20 cherry tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Halved to allow for a vibrant pop of color and additional acidity.

ingredients.name: Freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.notes: For a slight kick to balance the bitterness, add a few grinds at the end if desired.

instructions: In a skillet or wok over medium-high heat, warm the olive oil until shimmering.
Add garlic and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Squeeze in the lemon juice from the bitter part of the lemon. Deglaze the pan to create an emulsified sauce rich with lemony zest.
Fold in the diced tomato pieces, followed by halved cherry tomatoes.
Season lightly with sea salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Cook until the cherry tomatoes burst and the sauce thickens slightly but remains loose and vibrant, about 5-7 minutes.
Stir frequently to ensure even cooking and prevent sticking.
